architecture: Multi-tenant Modular Monolith with Unified Landing Page

core.description: Shared authentication (JWT), RBAC, Reception, and i18n framework.

landing_page.description: Innovative, modern face of Al Rayes Laundry & Dry Cleaning; gateways to IT and Laundry portals.

it_portal.description: IT Assets, Infrastructure Monitor, Secret Vault, and IT Ticketing.

laundry_portal.description: End-to-end laundry operations: Order lifecycle, Driver Dashboard, CRM, and Pricing.

migrations.description: Reconfiguring architecture for landing-page-driven entry points and unified portal gateways.
